title: NATS Object Store
description: Schema for NATS JetStream Object Store bucket configuration and object metadata. The Object Store is a JetStream-backed abstraction for storing arbitrarily large binary objects using a message chunking mechanism. Objects are identified by a bucket name and an object name. The backing JetStream stream uses the OBJ_ name prefix.

ObjectStoreBucketConfig.title: Object Store Bucket Configuration
ObjectStoreBucketConfig.description: Configuration for creating a NATS Object Store bucket. Maps to a JetStream stream with OBJ-specific defaults. The backing stream is created with the name OBJ_{bucket}.

bucket.description: Name of the Object Store bucket. Must be alphanumeric with underscores or hyphens. The backing JetStream stream is named OBJ_{bucket}.

description.description: Human-readable description of the bucket's purpose.

ttl.description: Time-to-live for objects in nanoseconds. Objects older than this are automatically removed. 0 means objects never expire.

storage.description: Backend storage type for object data.

num_replicas.description: Number of replicas for high availability in a JetStream cluster.

max_chunk_size.description: Maximum size in bytes for individual message chunks used to store object data. Larger objects are split into multiple chunks of this size.

max_bytes.description: Maximum total bytes for all objects and chunks in the bucket. -1 means no limit.

sources.description: Source streams to aggregate into this object store bucket for cross-account or cross-cluster replication.

ObjectInfo.title: Object Info
ObjectInfo.description: Metadata for a stored object in a NATS Object Store bucket. Does not include the object data itself; retrieve the object separately using get operations.

name.description: Name of the object within the bucket. Used as the primary identifier for get, delete, and update operations.

description.description: Optional human-readable description of the object.

headers.description: Optional key-value metadata headers associated with the object. Stored as NATS message headers on the info message.

bucket.description: Name of the bucket this object belongs to.

nuid.description: NATS unique identifier assigned to this object at creation. Used as part of the chunk subject pattern.

size.description: Total size in bytes of the stored object.

chunks.description: Number of message chunks the object was split into for storage.

sha256.description: Base64-encoded SHA-256 digest of the complete object data. Used to verify integrity after retrieval.

digest.description: Digest string in the format 'SHA-256={base64}' for verifying object integrity. Available in newer server versions.

mtime.description: Timestamp when the object was last modified (created or updated).

deleted.description: Whether this object has been marked as deleted. Deleted objects appear in watch results with this flag set.

ObjectMetaOptions.title: Object Meta Options
ObjectMetaOptions.description: Additional options embedded in an Object Store object metadata record.

max_chunk_size.description: Chunk size override for this specific object, in bytes. Overrides the bucket-level max_chunk_size.

ObjectLink.title: Object Link
ObjectLink.description: A link reference pointing to another object or bucket, enabling symbolic links within and across Object Store buckets.

bucket.description: Name of the target bucket for this link.

name.description: Name of the target object within the target bucket. If omitted this is a bucket-level link.

ObjectStoreBucketStatus.title: Object Store Bucket Status
ObjectStoreBucketStatus.description: Runtime status for an Object Store bucket including current configuration and storage usage.

bucket.description: Name of the Object Store bucket.

ttl.description: Configured TTL in nanoseconds. 0 means no expiry.

size.description: Total bytes currently stored across all objects and chunks in the bucket.

is_mirror.description: Whether this bucket mirrors another bucket.

Placement.title: Cluster Placement
Placement.description: Placement constraints for selecting which cluster nodes should hold stream replicas.

cluster.description: Name of the cluster the stream should be placed in.

tags.description: Server tags required for nodes that should hold stream replicas.

StreamSource.title: Stream Source
StreamSource.description: Reference to a source stream for mirroring or aggregating data into this object store's backing stream.

name.description: Name of the source stream to mirror or aggregate from.

opt_start_seq.description: Stream sequence number to start replicating from.

filter_subject.description: Subject filter to apply when sourcing from the named stream.

external.description: Configuration for sourcing from a stream in a remote account or cluster.

api.description: JetStream API prefix in the remote account, e.g. '$JS.hub.API'.

deliver.description: Subject prefix for delivering messages from the remote account.
